'''鈭歬-g-t-zh''' ('''kakagtezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:filmise|filmise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:filmise|filmise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-g-t-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kakagtezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikagtezhoko|thikagtezhoko]] || [[word:jikagtezhoko|jikagtezhoko]] || [[word:shikagtezhoko|shikagtezhoko]] || [[word:kikagtezhoko|kikagtezhoko]]
